title: centella sessilis
intro: Centella sessilis, also known as Qarabot or water hyssop, is a type of aquatic plant that belongs to the Apiaceae family. It has been traditionally used in Southeast Asian medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Centella sessilis include improved wound healing, enhanced cognitive function, and reduced risk of age-related diseases such as Alzheimer's and Parkinson's. Centella sessilis can be prepared as a herbal tea, tincture, or extract, and is often used in traditional medicine to support overall health and well-being.
